subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which is the capital city of Rajasthan and what are some of its famous places?
question_hi: राजस्थान की राजधानी और कुछ बड़े स्थानों के बार्षिकी के लिए मेरा उत्तर है।
explanation_en: Jaipur is the capital city of Rajasthan. Some famous places in Rajasthan include:
Some famous places in Rajasthan include:
explanation_hi: राजस्थान में कुछ बैसना के नाम हैं:

explanation_hi.subject: Rajasthan History
explanation_hi.question_en: Which of the following is the capital of Rajasthan?
explanation_hi.question_hi: राजस्थान का निवासक कौरम कौरमें हैं।
explanation_hi.explanation_en: The capital of Rajasthan is Jaipur. The other cities mentioned are Jodhpur, Udaipur, and Ahmedabad. None of these are the capital of Rajasthan.
explanation_hi.explanation_hi: राजस्थान का निवासक कौरम हैं। यहां से अन्यां हैं। इनको एक संतुषप्रधान को नहीं।
explanation_hi.question_en: What is the capital of Rajasthan and which are the other three cities?
explanation_hi.question_hi: राजस्थान का निवासक कौरम हैंको एक हैं।

options.question_en: Who are the founders of Jaipur and their contributions?
options.question_hi: जयपुर के निवार और उन्दीयां और उन्दीयां के माननं और उनके उत्तमियां
options.A_en: Sidharth Shukla and his foundation of Jaipur
options.B_en: Amar Singh and his contribution to Jaipur's development
options.C_en: Kishan Prasad and his contribution to Jaipur's architecture
options.D_en: Sardar Shivraj Singh and his establishment of Jaipur as a royal capital
options.explanation_en: Amar Singh was a prominent personality who contributed to Jaipur's architecture. He is known for designing the city's unique buildings and monuments. On the other hand, Sardar Shivraj Singh established Jaipur as a royal capital.
